allow: Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres -c "SELECT vm.id, vm.name, vm.embedded_id, e.id as embedded_id_from_embeddeds, e.subdomain, e.mac_address FROM ""vendingMachine"" vm LEFT JOIN embeddeds e ON vm.embedded_id = e.id WHERE vm.name ILIKE ''%lucien%'' OR vm.name ILIKE ''%test%'';")
